items.definition_en: A website is a place you visit on the internet.
items.example_en: She found information on a website.

items.definition_en: A server is a computer that gives data to other computers.
items.example_en: The website is down because the server is not working.

items.definition_en: A router connects your devices to the internet.
items.example_en: He restarted the router to fix the internet.

items.definition_en: A browser is a program used to look at internet pages.
items.example_en: She opened her browser to check her email.

items.definition_en: A network is a group of computers connected together.
items.example_en: My home has a Wi-Fi network.

items.definition_en: Wifi is a way to connect devices to the internet without wires.
items.example_en: He used wifi at the café.

items.definition_en: A modem lets you connect to the internet.
items.example_en: They bought a new modem for faster internet.

items.definition_en: A cable is a wire that connects equipment.
items.example_en: He plugged in the cable to set up the connection.

items.definition_en: An antenna is a device that helps send and receive signals.
items.example_en: The antenna helps the signal reach further.

items.definition_en: A switch connects computers together in a network.
items.example_en: The switch links computers in this office.

items.definition_en: A signal is the electronic message sent between devices.
items.example_en: The wifi signal was very weak.

items.definition_en: A firewall protects computers from unwanted access.
items.example_en: The firewall stopped the dangerous program.

items.definition_en: A router password keeps your wifi safe from others.
items.example_en: He changed the router password.

items.definition_en: A provider gives you access to the internet.
items.example_en: The provider fixed the internet problem.

items.definition_en: Bandwidth is the amount of data you can send or get.
items.example_en: They upgraded to higher bandwidth for streaming.

items.definition_en: A domain is the name of a website.
items.example_en: They bought a short domain for their company.

items.definition_en: A link sends you to a new page on the internet.
items.example_en: She clicked on the link to read more.

items.definition_en: A homepage is the main page of a website.
items.example_en: He changed the homepage on his browser.

items.definition_en: A login is the way you enter a website or service.
items.example_en: She forgot her login for the website.

items.definition_en: A connection is when your device can talk to the internet.
items.example_en: The connection was slow last night.
